'''dhathoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachmaking|coachmaking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachmaking|coachmaking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhathoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhætheseth|dhætheseth]] || [[word:dhæthesej|dhæthesej]] || [[word:dhæthesesh|dhæthesesh]] || [[word:dhæthese|dhæthese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhathothosoth|dhathothosoth]] || [[word:dhathothosoj|dhathothosoj]] || [[word:dhathothososh|dhathothososh]] || [[word:dhathothoso|dhathothoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhathosoth|dhathosoth]] || [[word:dhathosoj|dhathosoj]] || [[word:dhathososh|dhathososh]] || [[word:dhathoso|dhathoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhathofsoth|dhathofsoth]] || [[word:dhathofsoj|dhathofsoj]] || [[word:dhathofsosh|dhathofsosh]] || [[word:dhathofsof|dhathofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhathosotho|dhathosotho]] || [[word:dhathosojo|dhathosojo]] || [[word:dhathososho|dhathososho]] || [[word:dhathosoko|dhathosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhathosoth|dhathosoth]] || [[word:dhathosoj|dhathosoj]] || [[word:dhathososh|dhathososh]] || [[word:dhathoso|dhathoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhathosothol|dhathosothol]] || [[word:dhathosojol|dhathosojol]] || [[word:dhathososhol|dhathososhol]] || [[word:dhathosokol|dhathosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhathosothotho|dhathosothotho]] || [[word:dhathosojojo|dhathosojojo]] || [[word:dhathososhosho|dhathososhosho]] || [[word:dhathosoko|dhathosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhathosothon|dhathosothon]] || [[word:dhathosojon|dhathosojon]] || [[word:dhathososhon|dhathososhon]] || [[word:dhathosokon|dhathosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhathosothoro|dhathosothoro]] || [[word:dhathosojoro|dhathosojoro]] || [[word:dhathososhoro|dhathososhoro]] || [[word:dhathosokoro|dhathosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
